_meta.description: Lookup table mapping insurer name → claims fax number + mailing address. Used by credimed-claim-submitter to determine the fax destination and the address rendered on the ADA form.
_meta.format: Insurer key uses hyphens for clarity (e.g. 'delta-ca'). The Lambda matcher strips non-letters from both sides and sorts longest-first, so 'united-concordia' (15 chars) wins over generic 'united' (6) when both are present.

verificationLevels.verified-by-phone: Called the carrier's provider line and confirmed the fax number works
verificationLevels.found-on-carrier-website: Listed in a public PDF or page on the carrier's domain. Should be re-confirmed by phone before first real submission
verificationLevels.unconfirmed: Number not yet sourced; needs phone call

_meta.verificationMethod: Each entry has verifiedAt + verificationLevel. Numbers should be re-confirmed by phone every 12 months.
_meta.noFaxFallback: Where claimsFax is null, the carrier either refuses faxed claims (most Delta + Blues subsidiaries) or only publishes a mailing address. For these, admin must mail the bundle or submit via EDI/Availity. The Lambda surfaces 'No claims fax on file' to the admin UI so they can route manually.

anthem.notes: No paper-claims fax published; Anthem pushes Availity EDI. Mail PO Box 1115 Minneapolis MN 55440-1115. Provider line to verify fax: 800-627-0004.

bcbs-fep.notes: Source: bcbsfepdental.com/contactUs and dentalclaimssubmissionqrg.pdf. No public claims fax; mail to PO Box 75. Provider line: 855-504-2583 (1-855-504-BLUE).

bcbs-ma.displayName: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts (Dental Blue)

claimsAddress.line1: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts

bcbs-ma.notes: Source: bluecrossma.org Dental Blue ADA claim form. No published paper-claims fax; provider services 800-882-1178 option 3.

bcbs-tx.displayName: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas (Dental)

claimsAddress.line1: Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas

bcbs-tx.notes: Source: bcbstx.com dental-claim-tx.pdf. EDI-first via Availity (payor 84980); no dental-specific claims fax. Dental Benefits Customer Service: 800-367-6401.

cigna.notes: Cigna prefers electronic submission via CignaforHCP.com / Availity; fax is the documented fallback for paper claims. Provider line: 800-244-6224.

delta-ca.notes: Delta Dental does NOT accept faxed claims. EDI payer 03194 or paper. Provider line: 800-765-6003.

delta-ins-co.notes: Underwrites Delta Dental in GA/FL/TX/MS/LA/NV/UT/AL. No fax accepted. EDI payer 94276. Provider line: 800-521-2651.

delta-ma.notes: Address is account-specific; some accounts use PO Box 2907 Milwaukee WI 53201-2907. Confirm correct PO Box by phone: 800-872-0500. No fax accepted.

claimsAddress.line1: Delta Dental of New York, Inc.

delta-ny.notes: Administered by Delta Dental of Pennsylvania (payer ID 11198). Address sourced from third-party search; reconfirm by phone: 800-932-0783. No fax accepted.

delta-tx.displayName: Delta Dental of Texas (administered by Delta Dental Insurance Company)
delta-tx.notes: Delta Dental of Texas business is underwritten/administered by Delta Dental Insurance Company. DeltaCare USA TX uses PO Box 1810 Alpharetta GA 30023. No fax accepted. Provider line: 800-521-2651.

dentaquest.notes: Source: dentaquest.com provider guides. EDI payer ID CX014 preferred.

guardian.notes: Standard Guardian Dental claims fax. Managed DentalGuard plans use a different fax (+1 916-679-7197) and only accept claims that don't require x-rays. Confirm plan type from member ID card before sending.

humana.notes: Number from Humana's provider portal. Provider customer service: 800-833-2223.

liberty.notes: CA-specific claims may use PO Box 26110 Santa Ana CA 92799-6110. Provider line: 888-352-7924.

claimsAddress.line1: The Lincoln National Life Insurance Company
claimsAddress.line2: Dental Claims Input Center, PO Box 614008

principal.notes: No dental-specific claims fax published; Principal prefers EDI (Vyne Dental, DentalXChange) or email CSDClaims@exchange.principal.com. Provider line to verify fax: 800-247-4695.

renaissance.notes: No claims fax published; carrier uses email claims@renaissancefamily.com. Eligibility/claims line: 888-358-9484.

sunlife.displayName: Sun Life Financial Dental (formerly Assurant Dental)
sunlife.notes: Fax 623-760-1876 covers claims and pre-estimates. NY uses PO Box 1428; FL group A896 uses PO Box 1618. Provider line: 800-442-7742.

uhc.notes: EDI-first via Optum/Healthplex; payer ID 52133. No claims fax published on uhcdental.com. Provider line to verify fax: 800-822-5353.

united-concordia.notes: Same Harrisburg fax used for FFS commercial paper claims and TRICARE CONUS per UCCI contact materials. FFS member service: 800-332-0366. DHMO claims use PO Box 69422.
